vague_text: Looking at the solution, I see an over-concentration of polling sites — several bunched together in a small area while other regions are sparser. Re-balance by reducing the cluster.
precise_text: Polling places 1, 2, 33, 38 are clustered too tightly together — I count 4 sites within roughly 1.3 km of each other. Close one or two of them and let the optimiser redistribute coverage.
